channel.title: Curriculum Vitae on
channel.description: Recent content in Curriculum Vitae on

item.title: Conferences
item.description: 2020 Swiss Cytometry Meeting Febuary 5 - 7; Lausanne, Switzerland contribution(s): invited talk 2019 BioC Asia 2019 December 5 - 6; Sydney, Australia contribution(s): keynote & workshop BioC2019 June 24 - 27; New York City, USA contribution(s): oral & workshop 2018 EuroBioc2018 December 6 - 7; Munich, Germany contribution(s): oral 2017 Basel Computation Biology Conference September 13 - 15; Basel, Switzerland

item.title: Publications
item.description: Preprints Crowell HL☆, Chevrier S☆, Jacobs A, Sivapatham S, Tumor Profiler Consortium, Bodenmiller B✝& Robinson MD✝(2019): An R-based reproducible and user-friendly preprocessing pipeline for CyTOF data. F1000Research 9:1263. Crowell HL, Soneson C☆, Germain P-L☆, Calini D, Collin L Raposo C, Malhotra D & Robinson MD (2019): On the discovery of population-specific state transitions from multi-sample multi-condition single-cell RNA sequencing data. bioRxiv 713412.

item.title: Software
item.description: Packages Crowell HL, Zanotelli VRT, Chevrier S, Robinson MD (2019): CATALYST: Cytometry dATa anALYSis Tools. Bioconductor Crowell HL, Zanotelli VRT, Chevrier S & Robinson MD (2019): muscat: Multi-sample multi-group scRNA-seq data analysis tools. Bioconductor Code repositories
